howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to win. No hidden fees. No gambling — every competition is skill-based and fully compliant with UK law.

step1.title: Pick Your Prize
step1.desc: Browse our curated selection of premium prizes — electronics, jewellery, fashion, and cash awards. Find the one you want and click to enter.

step2.title: Answer & Buy Tickets
step2.desc: Answer a simple skill-based question to qualify, then purchase your tickets securely. Each ticket costs just £1.99. Enter free by post, too.

step3.title: Watch the Live Draw
step3.desc: Tune in on draw day — we stream every result live so you can watch the winner announcement in real time.

trending.title: Pick your prize

items.a: Golden Dream Draw is a skill-based competition platform. Unlike a lottery, you must answer a question correctly to enter, making it a competition of skill rather than chance.
No. Golden Dream Draw is a skill competition. UK law requires that winners are determined by skill, not purely by chance. Our skill question ensures compliance.
Browse competitions, select a prize, answer the skill question correctly, and purchase your ticket.
All winning entries are drawn live on YouTube. A random ticket number is selected from all valid entries. The complete draw is recorded and published.
You must be 18 or older to enter any competition on Golden Dream Draw.

items.q: When do I receive my prize?
items.a: Winners are notified within 24 hours of the draw. Prizes are dispatched within 14 working days after winner verification.

terms.title: GOLDEN DREAM DRAW
terms.subtitle: TERMS AND CONDITIONS

sections.title: COMPANY INFORMATION
sections.body:
Golden Dream Draw is operated by:

Golden Dream Draw.
PO Box 483, Green Lanes
London, N13 4FG
United Kingdom

Email: contact@goldendreamdraw.uk

sections.title: DEFINITIONS
sections.body:
In these Terms and Conditions, the following definitions apply:

"Company", "We", "Us", "Our" – refers to Golden Dream Draw, operating from PO Box 483, Green Lanes, London, N13 4FG.

"Competition" – refers to any skill-based prize competition organised and operated by the Company.

"Entry" or "Ticket" – refers to a paid competition entry purchased via our website or other authorised channels.

"Free Postal Entry" – refers to a free method of entry available to eligible participants, subject to the specific conditions set out in Section 13 of these Terms.

"Participant" or "You" – refers to any individual who enters a Competition operated by the Company.

"Prize" – refers to the item or sum of money described in each individual Competition listing.

"Skill Question" – refers to the question of skill that each applicant must answer correctly during account registration in order to qualify to enter Competitions operated by the Company.

"Draw" – refers to the process by which a winner is selected from all valid entries.

"Closing Date" – refers to the date and time by which all entries must be received, as stated on each Competition page.

sections.title: LEGAL BASIS AND REGULATORY FRAMEWORK
sections.body:
3.1 Golden Dream Draw operates competitions as skill-based prize competitions. These competitions are NOT lotteries or gambling products and are therefore NOT regulated by the Gambling Commission of Great Britain.

3.2 Our competitions are structured in accordance with:
The Gambling Act 2005 (as amended)
The Consumer Rights Act 2015
The Consumer Contracts (Information, Cancellation and Additional Charges) Regulations 2013
The UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018
The Competition Act 1998
The Advertising Standards Authority (ASA) guidelines

3.3 Skill-based competitions are lawful under UK law provided that: (a) entry requires the correct answer to a skill question, (b) a free entry route is genuinely available on equal terms, and (c) the competition is not conducted as a lottery. Golden Dream Draw complies fully with all applicable requirements.

sections.title: ELIGIBILITY TO ENTER
HOW TO ENTER — PAID ENTRY
THE SKILL QUESTION AND ACCOUNT REGISTRATION
sections.body:
6.1 In order to participate in any Competition operated by Golden Dream Draw, all participants are required to create a registered account. As part of the account registration process, each applicant must correctly answer a Skill Question. Only applicants who provide a correct answer to the Skill Question will be granted a valid registered account and thereby qualify to enter Competitions.

6.2 The Skill Question is designed to require genuine knowledge or reasoning ability to answer correctly. The question is presented during the account registration process, and applicants must answer it without assistance from automated tools or third parties. The specific Skill Question in use at any given time will be displayed on the registration page of the Company's website. The Company reserves the right to change the Skill Question at any time in accordance with clause 6.5, provided that any new question continues to require genuine skill or knowledge to answer correctly.

6.3 Applicants who provide an incorrect answer to the Skill Question during registration will not be granted a valid account and will not be permitted to purchase Competition tickets until they successfully complete a new registration with a correct answer. No charge is made for account registration.

6.4 The Skill Question must be answered independently and personally by the applicant. Use of automated tools, AI systems, scripts, or third-party assistance to determine or submit the correct answer is strictly prohibited and will result in account suspension and disqualification from all Competitions.

6.5 The Company reserves the right to update the Skill Question periodically. Existing account holders will be notified of any such change and may be required to re-confirm their Skill Question answer in order to maintain account validity. This measure is taken to ensure ongoing compliance with applicable UK competition law.

sections.title: TICKET PRICING AND PAYMENT
sections.body:
7.1 The price of each ticket is displayed clearly on the Competition page prior to purchase. Prices include VAT where applicable.

7.2 Accepted methods of payment include major credit and debit cards and other methods as displayed at checkout. All transactions are processed securely.

7.3 Golden Dream Draw does not store payment card details. All payments are processed by an authorised payment processor.

7.4 Receipts will be issued by email to the address provided at the time of purchase. It is the participant's responsibility to ensure that a valid email address is provided.

sections.title: THE DRAW PROCESS
sections.body:
8.1 Once a Competition closes, all valid entries (i.e. entries made by holders of valid registered accounts, with confirmed payment) will be entered into the Draw.

8.2 The Draw will be conducted using a verifiably random selection process. Where possible, draws will be conducted live and the process recorded for transparency.

8.3 The Draw will take place on the date announced on the Competition page, or as soon as practicable thereafter.

8.4 The Company reserves the right to extend a Competition's Closing Date if insufficient tickets are sold to cover the cost of the Prize. In such circumstances, participants will be informed and may request a refund.

8.5 If a Competition is cancelled due to insufficient entries, all participants will receive a full refund of their ticket purchase price within 14 working days.

sections.title: WINNER NOTIFICATION AND PRIZE FULFILMENT
sections.body:
9.1 The winner will be contacted within 48 hours of the Draw via the email address or telephone number provided at the time of entry.

9.2 The winner may also be announced publicly on our website and social media channels. By entering the Competition, participants consent to such announcement, which may include their first name and county of residence.

9.3 The prize will be fulfilled within fourteen (14) calendar days of the winner being confirmed and verified. This includes successful completion of any required identity verification.

9.4 If the winner cannot be contacted within 14 days of the Draw, or fails to respond to communications, or fails to complete required verification, the Company reserves the right to conduct a re-draw and award the Prize to an alternative winner.

9.5 Prizes are non-transferable and cannot be exchanged for cash or alternative items, unless stated otherwise on the Competition page. The Company reserves the right to substitute prizes of equal or greater value in exceptional circumstances.

9.6 Physical prizes will be delivered by tracked and insured postal or courier service to UK addresses only. The Company is not responsible for delays caused by third-party delivery providers once dispatch has been confirmed.

sections.title: REFUNDS AND CANCELLATION POLICY
POSTAL TICKET DELIVERY
sections.body:
11.1 Upon successful purchase of a ticket, a confirmation email will be sent to the registered email address containing the participant's unique ticket number(s).

11.2 Participants may also request a physical confirmation letter to be sent to their registered UK postal address. This service is provided free of charge and must be requested within 7 days of purchase.

11.3 Physical confirmation letters are sent via Royal Mail Second Class post. The Company accepts no responsibility for letters that are lost, delayed, or damaged in the post. The ticket reference number contained in the confirmation email remains the definitive proof of entry.

11.4 In the event of any discrepancy between a physical letter and the electronic ticket record, the electronic record held by Golden Dream Draw shall be deemed authoritative.

sections.title: CONDUCT AND DISQUALIFICATION
FREE POSTAL ENTRY
DATA PROTECTION AND PRIVACY
INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
sections.body:
15.1 All content on the Golden Dream Draw website, including text, images, logos, and competition materials, is the property of Golden Dream Draw and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

15.2 Participants may not reproduce, distribute, or make commercial use of any content from our website without prior written consent.

sections.title: LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
AMENDMENTS TO TERMS AND CONDITIONS
sections.body:
17.1 The Company reserves the right to amend these Terms and Conditions at any time. Any changes will be published on our website with a revised effective date.

17.2 Continued participation in a Competition after changes have been published constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

17.3 In the event of a conflict between these general Terms and any specific Competition rules, the specific Competition rules shall prevail.

sections.title: COMPLAINTS PROCEDURE
sections.body:
18.1 If you have a complaint regarding any aspect of a Competition or our services, please contact us in the first instance at: contact@goldendreamdraw.uk.

18.2 We aim to acknowledge all complaints within 5 working days and to provide a full response within 21 working days.

18.3 If you are not satisfied with our response, you may seek further resolution through Citizens Advice (www.citizensadvice.org.uk) or, where appropriate, through the courts of England and Wales.

sections.title: GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION
sections.body:
19.1 These Terms and Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales.

19.2 Any dispute arising from or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

sections.title: MISCELLANEOUS
sections.body:
20.1 The Company's decision on all matters relating to a Competition, including the interpretation of these Terms, is final and binding.

20.2 If any provision of these Terms is found to be unlawful, void, or unenforceable, that provision shall be deemed severable and shall not affect the validity and enforceability of the remaining provisions.

20.3 Failure by the Company to enforce any provision of these Terms shall not be construed as a waiver of that provision.

20.4 These Terms constitute the entire agreement between the participant and the Company in relation to each Competition.

terms.footer: Golden Dream Draw is not regulated by the Gambling Commission. Our competitions are skill-based and are not lotteries.
